---
title: "PB90 SGLT2i proportions"
author: "Ye Ji Choi"
format: html
---

```{r echo = F}
library(dplyr)
library(Seurat)
library(aws.s3)
library(jsonlite)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(nebula)
library(openxlsx)
library(table1)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(Hmisc)
library(ggtext)
library(corrplot)
library(gtools)
library(foreach)
library(emmeans)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(future)
library(BiocParallel)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scran)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
```

```{r echo = F}
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "choiyej") { # local version
  root_path <- "/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UW/Laura Pyle - Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
  git_path <- "/Users/choiyej/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
} else if (user == "rameshsh") { # hyak version
  root_path <- ""
  git_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/rameshsh/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
} else if (user == "yejichoi") { # hyak version
  root_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/yejichoi/"
  git_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/yejichoi/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/yejichoi/keys.json")
} else if (user == "pylell") {
  root_path <- "/Users/pylell/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UW/Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
  git_path <- "/Users/pylell/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}

Sys.setenv(
  "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" = keys$MY_ACCESS_KEY,
  "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY" = keys$MY_SECRET_KEY,
  "AWS_DEFAULT_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_S3_ENDPOINT" = "s3.kopah.uw.edu"
)

```

```{r echo = F}
s3read_using_region <- function(FUN, ..., object, bucket, region = NULL, opts = NULL, filename = NULL) {
  if (missing(bucket)) {
    bucket <- get_bucketname(object)
  }
  object <- get_objectkey(object)
  
  tmp <- if (is.character(filename)) {
    file.path(tempdir(TRUE), filename)
  } else {
    tempfile(fileext = paste0(".", tools::file_ext(object)))
  }
  
  on.exit(unlink(tmp))
  
  # Add region to opts if provided
  if (!is.null(region)) {
    if (is.null(opts)) {
      opts <- list(region = region)
    } else {
      opts$region <- region
    }
  }
  
  if (is.null(opts)) {
    r <- save_object(bucket = bucket, object = object, file = tmp)
  } else {
    r <- do.call("save_object", c(list(bucket = bucket, 
                                       object = object, 
                                       file = tmp), opts))
  }
  
  return(FUN(tmp, ...))
}

s3write_using_region <- function(FUN, ..., object, bucket,
                                 region = NULL, opts = NULL, filename = NULL) {
  ext  <- if (!is.null(filename)) tools::file_ext(filename) else tools::file_ext(object)
  tmp  <- tempfile(fileext = if (nchar(ext) > 0) paste0(".", ext) else "")
  on.exit(unlink(tmp))
  FUN(..., file = tmp)
  args <- list(file = tmp, object = object, bucket = bucket)
  if (!is.null(region)) args$region <- region
  if (!is.null(opts))   args        <- c(args, opts)
  do.call(aws.s3::put_object, args)
}
```

```{r echo = F}
pb90 <- s3readRDS(bucket = "scrna", object = 'data_clean/pb90_processed.rds', region = "")
```

```{r}
ct_col      <- "KPMP_celltype"
subject_col <- "record_id"
group_col   <- "sglt2i_timepoint"
sample_col <- "kit_id"
# pull metadata out of the Seurat object
md <- pb90@meta.data %>%
  filter(sglt2i_timepoint != ".") %>%
  filter(group == "Type 2 Diabetes") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  select(all_of(c(sample_col, subject_col, group_col, ct_col)))

md_distinct <- md %>%
  distinct(record_id, .keep_all = T)
table(md_distinct$sglt2i_timepoint)
# counts per sample x cell type, including explicit zeros
counts <- md %>%
  dplyr::count(across(all_of(c(sample_col, subject_col, group_col))),
        .data[[ct_col]], name = "count") %>%
  dplyr::rename(KPMP_celltype = !!ct_col) %>%
  complete(
    nesting(!!!syms(c(sample_col, subject_col, group_col))),
    KPMP_celltype,
    fill = list(count = 0)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(across(all_of(sample_col))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total = sum(count),
         proportion = count / total) %>%
  ungroup()

sccomp_res <- sccomp_estimate(
  counts,
  formula_composition = ~ sglt2i_timepoint + (1 | record_id),
  .sample = kit_id, 
  .cell_group = KPMP_celltype, 
  .count = count
) %>% sccomp_test()

# drop the per-subject random intercepts, keep population effects
sccomp_res <- sccomp_res |> dplyr::filter(!grepl("___", parameter)) |>
  dplyr::filter(parameter == "sglt2i_timepointYes") |>
  dplyr::mutate(credible = sign(c_lower) == sign(c_upper)) |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(c_effect)))

# mutlipanel_theme in the package is error-prone
multipanel_theme <- theme_minimal()
sccomp_res |> 
  plot_1D_intervals() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#bfc0c0",
                                "TRUE" = "#f07167"))

s3write_using_region(FUN = ggsave,
                     bucket = "scrna",
                     region = "",
                     object = "Projects/PB90_proportions/Figures/t2d_sccomp_celltype_intervals_sglt2i_timepoint.png",
                     width = 8, 
                     height = 8, 
                     dpi = 300, 
                     bg = "transparent")

plot_df <- sccomp_res %>%
  dplyr::select(KPMP_celltype, count_data) %>%
  unnest(count_data) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(kit_id) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(proportion = count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = sglt2i_timepoint, y = proportion, fill = sglt2i_timepoint)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.6, position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.8),
             size = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ KPMP_celltype, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Proportion", fill = "SGLT2i@bx") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("No" = "#eec170",
                               "Yes" = "#f58549"))

s3write_using_region(FUN = ggsave,
                     bucket = "scrna",
                     region = "",
                     object = "Projects/PB90_proportions/Figures/t2d_sccomp_celltype_facet_proportions_boxplot_sglt2i_timepoint.png",
                     width = 12, 
                     height = 12, 
                     dpi = 300, 
                     bg = "transparent")

```

```{r}
ct_col      <- "KPMP_celltype"
subject_col <- "record_id"
group_col   <- "sglt2i_ever"
sample_col <- "kit_id"
# pull metadata out of the Seurat object
md <- pb90@meta.data %>%
  filter(!is.na(sglt2i_ever)) %>%
  filter(group == "Type 2 Diabetes") %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  select(all_of(c(sample_col, subject_col, group_col, ct_col)))

md_distinct <- md %>%
  distinct(record_id, .keep_all = T)
table(md_distinct$sglt2i_ever)

# counts per sample x cell type, including explicit zeros
counts <- md %>%
  dplyr::count(across(all_of(c(sample_col, subject_col, group_col))),
        .data[[ct_col]], name = "count") %>%
  dplyr::rename(KPMP_celltype = !!ct_col) %>%
  complete(
    nesting(!!!syms(c(sample_col, subject_col, group_col))),
    KPMP_celltype,
    fill = list(count = 0)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(across(all_of(sample_col))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total = sum(count),
         proportion = count / total) %>%
  ungroup()

sccomp_res <- sccomp_estimate(
  counts,
  formula_composition = ~ sglt2i_ever + (1 | record_id),
  .sample = kit_id, 
  .cell_group = KPMP_celltype, 
  .count = count
) %>% sccomp_test()

# drop the per-subject random intercepts, keep population effects
sccomp_res <- sccomp_res |> dplyr::filter(!grepl("___", parameter)) |>
  dplyr::filter(parameter == "sglt2i_everYes") |>
  dplyr::mutate(credible = sign(c_lower) == sign(c_upper)) |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(c_effect)))

# mutlipanel_theme in the package is error-prone
multipanel_theme <- theme_minimal()
sccomp_res |> 
  plot_1D_intervals() +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#bfc0c0",
                                "TRUE" = "#f07167"))

s3write_using_region(FUN = ggsave,
                     bucket = "scrna",
                     region = "",
                     object = "Projects/PB90_proportions/Figures/t2d_sccomp_celltype_intervals_sglt2i_ever.png",
                     width = 8, 
                     height = 8, 
                     dpi = 300, 
                     bg = "transparent")

plot_df <- sccomp_res %>%
  dplyr::select(KPMP_celltype, count_data) %>%
  unnest(count_data) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(kit_id) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(proportion = count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = sglt2i_ever, y = proportion, fill = sglt2i_ever)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.6, position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.8),
             size = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ KPMP_celltype, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Proportion", fill = "SGLT2i ever") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("No" = "#eec170",
                               "Yes" = "#f58549"))

s3write_using_region(FUN = ggsave,
                     bucket = "scrna",
                     region = "",
                     object = "Projects/PB90_proportions/Figures/t2d_sccomp_celltype_facet_proportions_boxplot_sglt2i_ever.png",
                     width = 12, 
                     height = 12, 
                     dpi = 300, 
                     bg = "transparent")

```
